description:
## [1.39.0](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/compare/v1.38.1...v1.39.0) (2026-07-20)

### Features

* **youtube:** add list_mix, the authenticated mix/radio for the current video. Unlike list_suggestions it uses the client context this app credentials are valid for, so results are personalised and genuinely related rather than generic.
